input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.4.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.4.4.2
            TITLE: the test passes if the imd shuts down the tractive system in 30 seconds or less at a fault

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.4.4.2: The test passes if the IMD shuts down the Tractive System in 30 seconds or less at a fault
IN.4.4.2 The test passes if the IMD shuts down the Tractive System in 30 seconds or less at a fault 
resistance of 50% below the response value corresponding to 250 Ohm / Volt

final_answer: rule IN.4.4.2: The test passes if the IMD shuts down the Tractive System in 30 seconds or less at a fault resistance of 50% below the response value corresponding to 250 Ohm / Volt
